General.Name: First Service Holding Ltd
General.Description: First Service Holding Limited provides property management services, green living solutions, and value-added services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through First Property Management and First Living segments. Its property management services comprise cleaning, security, gardening, and repair and maintenance to property developers, property owners, and residents. The company's portfolio of properties under management includes residential properties; and non-residential properties, such as office buildings, schools, hospitals, parks, cultural and sports centres, shopping malls, logistics parks and passenger terminals. In addition, it provides green living solutions consisting of energy operation, green technology consulting, and systems installation services, as well as sells AIRDINO systems. Further, the company offers value-added services, including parking space management; preliminary planning and design consultancy; sales assistance; and property utilisation services, as well as home living and communal area leasing services to non-property owners, property owners, and residents. First Service Holding Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
